name: Deirdre O'Kane
blurb: Deirdre O Kane is an Irish stand-up comedian and actress from Drogheda who began performing comedy in 1996 and has appeared at the Edinburgh Festival across many years.
bio: Deirdre O Kane is an Irish stand-up comedian and actress from Drogheda who began performing comedy in 1996 and has appeared at the Edinburgh Festival across many years. Alongside her live comedy she has built a substantial acting career on stage and screen, earning multiple Irish Film and Television Award nominations. She won the IFTA for Best Lead Actress in 2015 for the film Noble.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up; reaches BBC New Comedy Awards finals
Solo Edinburgh show Deirdre O Kane is Crystallized
Stars as Christina Noble in the film Noble
Wins IFTA Best Lead Actress for Noble
Competes on Dancing with the Stars Ireland
Hosts The Deirdre O Kane Show on Sky Max
